title: 67 Totem
description: This Resource Pack replaces the original totem with one looking like a Minecraft themed 67. If you are brainrotted you are the perfect user of this texture pack!
body: 67 Totem Texture Pack is a clean and minimalist totem redesign that gives your Minecraft gameplay a fresh, stylish look. With smooth details and a bold, modern aesthetic, it makes the Totem of Undying stand out without being distracting. Perfect for PvP and survival players who want a simple yet eye-catching upgrade to their UI.
